rulings.Case Title: LEILA STRINGFELLOW, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR AND AS et al VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Union Pacific Railroad Company To Compel The Depositions Of Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MAY 20, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Defendant Union Pacific Railroad Co.'s motion to compel the depositions of plaintiffs Mary Jean Wozny, Marlene Warlick and Rebecca Cummings: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30a.m., not 9:00a.m. Defendant must bring a proposed order to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
